name: apple-text
description: Comprehensive reference for Apple text systems — especially TextKit, UITextView, NSTextView, layout managers, text storage, attributed strings, text input, and other non-SwiftUI text work
author: sitapix

skills.name: apple-text
skills.description: Use when working with ANY non-SwiftUI text rendering, editing, or display — TextKit 1/2 architecture, UITextView, NSTextView, NSLayoutManager, NSTextLayoutManager, text storage, attributed strings, text input, layout invalidation, Writing Tools. Routes to specialized skills and agents.

skills.name: apple-text-audit
skills.description: Use when auditing Apple text system code for TextKit fallback triggers, editing lifecycle bugs, deprecated APIs, performance risks, or Writing Tools compatibility problems.

skills.name: apple-text-views
skills.description: Use when choosing between SwiftUI Text, TextField, TextEditor, UITextView, and NSTextView — capability tradeoffs and decision guide.

skills.name: apple-text-textkit-diag
skills.description: Use when the user starts with a broken Apple text symptom such as stale layout, fallback, crashes in editing, rendering artifacts, missing Writing Tools, or large-document slowness.

skills.name: apple-text-recipes
skills.description: Use when the user has a "how do I..." question about text views and needs a quick working recipe or copy-paste snippet for a common text task.
